channel.title: Error when fetching a custom post from a custom endpoint

item.title: Error when fetching a custom post from a custom endpoint
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @mautorressantos

Could you provide a link to a repo so that we can take a look at your code and clone it for testing. Thanks.

Read full topic
item.source: Error when fetching a custom post from a custom endpoint

item.title: Error when fetching a custom post from a custom endpoint
item.dc:creator: mautorressantos
item.description:
I am trying to bring the courses from the end point that a plugin generates.

Handler

export const routeCourseArchive = {
  name: "courses",
  priority:  8,
  pattern:  "/courses",  
  func: async ({ route, state, libraries }) => {    
    // 1. get all Courses
    const coursesList = await libraries.source.api.get({
      endpoint: "/llms/v1/courses"
    });
    // 2. add everything to the state.
    const items = await libraries.source.populate({
      response: coursesList,
      state
    });
    // 3. add info to data
    Object.assign(state.source.data[route], {
      GeneralTitle: 'Learning',
      isArchiveCourses: true,
      isPostType: true,
      type: "course",
      items: items.map(item => ({
        type: item.type,
        id: item.id,
        link: item.link
      }))
    });
  }
}

frontity.settings.js

"postTypes": [
 {
  "type": "course",
  "endpoint": "/llms/v1/courses",
  "archive": "/courses",
 }
]

ServerError: post type from endpoints “posts,pages,media” with slug coursesundefined" not found

Read full topic
item.source: Error when fetching a custom post from a custom endpoint
